content:
# Mineralogy and Crystallography

**Summary**: Broad research theme addressed in the thesis collection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1996-matter|Matter, 1996]] contributed to the theme of Mineralogy

- [[2012-geri|Geri, 2012]] analyzed the filter cake mineralogy to determine its composition.

- [[2014-elhag|ELHAG, 2014]] analyzed the mineralogy of raw bentonite to ensure purity.

- [[2022-radwan|Radwan, 2022]] investigated the mineralogy of Arabian sands to determine their suitability for solar applications.

- [[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025]] used machine learning to automate quantitative mineralogical analysis.

## Key Subtopics



- [[2012-geri|Geri, 2012]] analyzed the filter cake mineralogy to determine its composition.

- [[2014-elhag|ELHAG, 2014]] analyzed the mineralogy of raw bentonite to ensure purity.

- [[2022-radwan|Radwan, 2022]] investigated the mineralogy of Arabian sands to determine their suitability for solar applications.

- [[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025]] used machine learning to automate quantitative mineralogical analysis.

## Methods and Approaches Used



## Key Findings Across Sources

- contributed to the theme of Mineralogy ([[1996-matter|Matter, 1996]])

- Main phases identified were Quartz and Calcite. ([[2012-geri|Geri, 2012, p. 96]])

- Identified quartz (SiO2) and plagioclase as primary components. ([[2014-elhag|ELHAG, 2014]])

- Pure quartzose sands (≥99% quartz) have the best thermo-physical properties. ([[2022-radwan|Radwan, 2022, p. 52]])

- STEGO was used for clustering ore minerals, specifically pyrite, in thin sections. ([[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025, p. 30]])
